title: Active Lane Mounted Stage Frame
summary: Wrapped the selected lane body in a bounded animated mounted-stage frame so Overview, Path, Chronicle, Trail, Game, and Comms depth scrolls inside the cockpit instead of stretching the whole command surface.
goalFit: Moves the Atlas away from a tall report page and toward a premium game cockpit where lane depth expands inside a controlled surface.
proof: web/styles.css bounds the mounted stage with internal scrolling and a scan animation
web/data/snapshot.json records the unlock in the platform engineering lane after regeneration
